# ClawMatrix

> Open source control plane for AI agent fleets. Register agents, control network egress, schedule tasks, and manage agent-to-agent communication — works with any agent runtime (OpenClaw, PicoClaw, Claude Code, NanoClaw, or custom).

ClawMatrix is a lightweight Go server that acts as the management layer for multi-agent AI systems. A sidecar proxy called Clutch runs alongside each agent, handling registration, heartbeats, network monitoring, and request proxying — without requiring any changes to the agent itself.

## Use Cases

- Monitor a fleet of AI agents across environments from one dashboard
- Control which domains each agent can reach (egress allowlist, enforced via iptables)
- Schedule recurring tasks for agents using cron expressions
- Define agent-to-agent delegation paths (A can send tasks to B)
- Browse and edit agent workspaces and session history from a UI
- Manage multi-agent systems built on OpenClaw, PicoClaw, or custom runtimes

## Source & Docs

- [GitHub](https://github.com/somit/clawmatrix): source code, issues, releases
- [README](https://github.com/somit/clawmatrix/blob/main/README.md): full feature overview, architecture, configuration
- [Dashboard Tour](https://github.com/somit/clawmatrix/blob/main/docs/dashboard.md): screenshots of every UI screen
- [Contributing / Adding a Runtime](https://github.com/somit/clawmatrix/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to add a new agent runtime

## Examples

- [Multi-agent business team](https://github.com/somit/clawmatrix/tree/main/examples/docker-compose-team): CEO, CTO, Marketing Manager, Sales Manager, Tech Lead — full Docker Compose stack

## API Reference

Once ClawMatrix is running, the full machine-readable API reference is at:

  GET /llms.txt  on your control plane instance (e.g. https://your-cp.example.com/llms.txt)

This returns a complete API reference with your base URL pre-filled, designed for LLMs (Claude, GPT, etc.) to understand and call the API directly without reading docs.

## Key Concepts

- **Registration** — a hosted runtime instance (one OpenClaw or PicoClaw server). Defines which domains agents are allowed to reach.
- **Agent** — an individual AI agent process registered with the control plane. Has health status, uptime, session history.
- **Clutch** — the sidecar proxy binary. Handles registration, heartbeats, egress enforcement, request proxying.
- **Connection** — a defined delegation path between agents. Source agent can call `clutch delegate <target>`.
- **Allowlist** — per-registration egress rules. Supports exact domains, wildcards (*.example.com), exact IPs, and CIDR ranges.
- **Cron** — scheduled message delivered to an agent's session on a cron schedule or at a specific time.
- **Sniffer** — embedded goroutine in Clutch that reads raw packets via AF_PACKET and enforces the allowlist via iptables.

## Technology

- Control plane: Go, SQLite (default) or PostgreSQL, embedded UI
- Clutch (sidecar): Go, Linux (AF_PACKET + iptables for network enforcement)
- TLS: optional Let's Encrypt via autocert, cert stored in DB
- License: MIT
